title: Reliable Netherite Totem
description: How can gold protect? Netherite totem will be more reliable
body:
This texture pack replaces the standard golden Totem of Undying with a far more formidable version — crafted from tough netherite and adorned with bright diamond eyes.

Netherite is the most durable material in Minecraft, and the diamonds add a sense of prestige and value. This totem looks much more reliable and intimidating than the regular golden one, showing that its holder is ready for any danger.

Compatible with any modpack, it doesn’t change gameplay — only the visuals — adding more style and atmosphere to your game.
